channel.title: Comments for page "Report about Searching for the Demon Foxes"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "Report about Searching for the Demon Foxes"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: It is a group of Serpent's Hand leaders (this article also contains information about Midnight the Cat). However, SH is decentralized anarchistic society, and not everyone is connected to them. That's why the captain of Korean SH dimisses them.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Maybe this can be helpful.

"Woodsorrels mountain tiger (Jangsan beom)" was Korean cryptid which was popular in the first half of 2010s. Most "witnesses" argued that local legends had told its exsistance. However, folkorists say that there is no such legend and this cryptid stories are pure hoax of internet.

I used this theme just because the background of this hoax was Pusan City, the last known location of 2953. Not so much particular intention.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Another interesting social examination of anomalous circumstances with world building to boot. +1

Out of curiosity, what exactly is the Serpent's Nest?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Good format, specially the conversation in the second-last section.

For curiosity, are there english translations available for the korean links?

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Thanks for the critters at #thecritters including Zyn, and especially RockTeethMothEyes for copyediting grammatical issues.
